description: Catalog of blocker archetype definitions for the Condition Pattern Library. Each archetype defines a recurring blocker pattern that may be referenced by condition patterns. Runtime may reference these archetypes but must not author new ones.

archetypes.label: Missing Flashing Termination
archetypes.description: Flashing system does not have a defined termination point, leaving the membrane or flashing edge exposed to wind uplift and water infiltration.

archetypes.label: Incomplete Parapet Detail
archetypes.description: Parapet section detail is missing or does not show all required components (cap flashing, through-wall flashing, base flashing, coping).

archetypes.label: Unresolved Membrane Transition
archetypes.description: Membrane transition from horizontal to vertical plane lacks a defined detail, creating an unresolved interface.

archetypes.label: Missing Termination Bar Specification
archetypes.description: Termination bar material, profile, and fastener pattern are not specified in the contract documents.

archetypes.label: Substrate Incompatibility
archetypes.description: The specified termination method is incompatible with the substrate material (e.g., concrete fasteners specified for metal panel substrate).

archetypes.label: Fastener Pullout Risk
archetypes.description: Fastener embedment depth or type is inadequate for wind uplift forces at the specified location.

archetypes.label: Undefined Scope Ownership
archetypes.description: No trade or discipline has been assigned responsibility for the specified work item, creating a scope gap.

archetypes.label: Missing Counterflashing Detail
archetypes.description: Counterflashing section detail is absent from the drawing set, leaving the interface between base flashing and wall undefined.

archetypes.label: Reglet Coordination Gap
archetypes.description: Reglet installation requires coordination between masonry and roofing trades that has not been defined in the sequence or scope.

archetypes.label: Insufficient Slope Design
archetypes.description: Roof slope is below the minimum 1/4 inch per foot required for positive drainage, or slope direction conflicts with drain locations.

archetypes.label: Missing Tapered Insulation Layout
archetypes.description: Tapered insulation layout drawing with thickness callouts, slope arrows, and cricket locations is not provided.

archetypes.label: Drain Location Conflict
archetypes.description: Drain locations shown on plumbing drawings conflict with structural framing or slope design on architectural drawings.

archetypes.label: Insulation Compressive Strength Inadequate
archetypes.description: Specified insulation compressive strength (psi) is below the required value for anticipated loads at equipment or high-traffic areas.

archetypes.label: Equipment Pad Detail Missing
archetypes.description: Mechanical equipment pad detail showing load distribution, insulation reinforcement, and membrane protection is not provided.

archetypes.label: Specification Conflict - Insulation
archetypes.description: Roofing specification insulation requirements conflict with structural or mechanical specification assumptions.
